safe_reusable_requirements: Evidence grading must distinguish mainstream, emerging, mixed, theoretical and unsafe claims.
Every health output must include safety notes, contraindications, interactions, monitoring and professional-escalation triggers.
Alternative, frequency, biofield and Spooky2 material must be complementary or exploratory, never a replacement for diagnosis or treatment.
Emergency red flags and qualified clinical review take precedence.
User-provided history and assistant-generated medical proposals must remain separate source classes.
quarantined_claim_categories: experimental gene editing, DBS, optogenetics or invasive procedures presented as actionable treatment
unverified psychedelic, ibogaine or ketamine dosing protocols
frequency or bioresonance claims presented as drug simulation or disease cure
unverified clinic, expert, legal-status or regulatory claims
medical outreach or booking instructions without current verification and owner approval
truth_boundary: Quarantine preserves evidence without endorsing or executing unsafe source claims.
